query:
SELECT COUNT(*) AS "count!: i64",
                      MAX(d.detected_at) AS "last_at: i64"
               FROM detections d
               JOIN labels l ON l.id = d.label_id
               WHERE l.scientific_name = $1
                 AND d.station_id = $2
                 AND d.detected_at < $3
                 AND d.confidence >= $4
